title: invoice — published events
description: Every event implements `ShouldDispatchAfterCommit` so listeners never fire against a rolled-back write. InvoicePaid is the LOAD-BEARING event of the module — it triggers the marketing::MembershipPurchased signal AND transitions the parent Membership to status='active'. InvoiceUncollectible + InvoiceSentToCollections are compliance-critical signals (bad-debt write-off + collections-agency handoff both feed the finance ledger). InvoiceLineAdded/Updated/Removed only fire while status='draft' — once the invoice is finalized, lines are immutable + credit notes replace them. Every state transition is audit-logged (7-year retention).

events.name: InvoiceCreated
events.trigger: InvoiceObserver.creating committed a new invoices row. Fires exactly once per invoice. Precedes any InvoiceLineAdded events.
consumers: audit::WriteToAuditLog (retention: 7 years — financial record per SOX §404)

events.name: InvoiceFinalized
events.trigger: InvoiceObserver.updating detected status transition draft → open. All lines have tax_calculation_id + totals frozen. Precedes InvoiceSent (dispatched separately by SendInvoiceEmailJob).

events.name: InvoiceSent
events.trigger: SendInvoiceEmailJob successfully delivered the invoice email. Sets invoices.sent_at.

events.name: InvoiceViewed
events.trigger: POST /invoices/{invoice}/mark-viewed OR the email-tracking pixel fired. Sets invoices.viewed_by_customer_at on FIRST view; subsequent views are idempotent (no re-fire).

events.name: InvoicePaid
events.trigger: LOAD-BEARING. InvoiceObserver.updating detected status transition any → paid. Requires amount_paid_cents == total_cents. Fires the marketing::CaptureMembershipPurchasedMarketingEvent when membership_id is set (the marketing lane's revenue signal).
consumers: growth::marketing::CaptureMembershipPurchasedMarketingEvent (when membership_id present — the load-bearing marketing signal)
membership::ActivateMembershipOnInvoicePaid (when membership_id present — transitions Membership status=active + generates Passes)

events.name: InvoicePartiallyPaid
events.trigger: InvoiceObserver.updating detected 0 < amount_paid_cents < total_cents. Status transitions to 'partially_paid'. Non-terminal — the invoice can still reach 'paid' with future payments.

events.name: InvoiceVoided
events.trigger: InvoiceObserver.updating detected status transition draft/open → void. REFUSED when status IN ('paid', 'partially_paid') — those must go through credit-note issuance. Requires void_reason + admin+finance role.

events.name: InvoiceUncollectible
events.trigger: Compliance-critical. InvoiceObserver.updating detected status transition past_due → uncollectible. Signals bad-debt write-off. Only allowed after N days past due AND admin+finance role. Feeds the accounting write-off ledger.
consumers: monitoring::MetricsCollector (increments academorix.invoice.uncollectible_total — every fire is a bad-debt loss signal)

events.name: InvoicePastDue
events.trigger: MarkOverdueInvoicesJob detected due_date < now() AND status IN ('open', 'partially_paid'). Transitions status to 'past_due'. Kicks off the dunning schedule.

events.name: InvoiceRefunded
events.trigger: Refund module fired refund.issued for an invoice's payment. InvoiceObserver reflects the state change: status transitions paid → refunded (full refund) OR stays 'paid' (partial refund). A CreditNote is issued in parallel via GenerateCreditNoteJob.

events.name: InvoiceDisputed
events.trigger: Chargeback module fired chargeback.filed for the invoice's payment. Status transitions paid → disputed. Admin intervention required.

events.name: InvoiceDunningStarted
events.trigger: First DispatchDunningRemindersJob run after InvoicePastDue. Sets invoices.collection_status = 'in_dunning'. Precedes the ladder of reminder notifications.

events.name: InvoiceDunningEscalated
events.trigger: DispatchDunningRemindersJob progressed to a later stage of the dunning cadence (day+3 → day+7 → day+14 → day+30 → day+60). Each escalation fires once.

events.name: InvoiceSentToCollections
events.trigger: Enterprise-only. EscalateDunningToCollectionsJob handed off to a third-party collections agency after N days past due (default 60). Sets invoices.collection_status = 'with_collections'.

events.name: InvoiceWrittenOff
events.trigger: Compliance-critical. Terminal write-off after collections gives up (typically 180 days past due). Sets invoices.collection_status = 'written_off'. Feeds bad-debt expense line on the accounting ledger.
consumers: monitoring::MetricsCollector (every fire is a bad-debt loss)

events.name: InvoiceReactivated
events.trigger: Rare. Admin manually revives a written-off invoice (e.g. the customer paid after all). Status transitions written_off → paid + records the recovery.

events.name: InvoiceLineAdded
events.trigger: InvoiceLineObserver.creating committed a new invoice_lines row. Only fires while parent invoice.status='draft' — post-finalize additions are refused.

payload.item_type: string (membership_charge / addon / setup_fee / late_fee / adjustment / one_time_service)

events.name: InvoiceLineUpdated
events.trigger: InvoiceLineObserver.updating detected mutation while parent invoice.status='draft'. Refused post-finalize.

events.name: InvoiceLineRemoved
events.trigger: InvoiceLineObserver.deleting committed. Only allowed while parent invoice.status='draft'. Recomputes invoice totals + re-assigns line_numbers.

events.name: CreditNoteCreated
events.trigger: CreditNoteObserver.creating committed a new credit_notes row. Reason + amount + original_invoice reference all set. Precedes CreditNoteIssued after PDF generation.

payload.reason: string (refund / adjustment / write_off / duplicate / customer_dispute_resolved / accounting_correction)

events.name: CreditNoteIssued
events.trigger: CreditNoteObserver.updating detected status transition draft → issued. PDF ready + delivered. Sets credit_notes.status='issued'.

events.name: CreditNoteApplied
events.trigger: CreditNoteObserver.updating detected status transition issued → applied. The credit was consumed — either applied to a refund, offset against a future invoice, or added to the customer's account balance. Sets applied_to_type + applied_to_id.

events.name: CreditNoteVoided
events.trigger: Rare + audit-heavy. Draft credit notes may be voided by admin before issuance (typo/mistake). Issued/applied credit notes CANNOT be voided — they're immutable financial records.
consumers: audit::WriteToAuditLog (retention: 7 years — every void of a financial record is compliance-critical)
